vocab.meaning: những thiết bị công nghệ không thể thiếu
vocab.example: My noise-canceling earbuds have become indispensable gadgets that I never leave home without.
I adopt a minimalist approach when heading out, opting for a tiny crossbody bag instead of a bulky rucksack.

vocab.meaning: kho dự phòng cho trường hợp khẩn cấp (thường là tiền mặt)
vocab.example: I always keep a small emergency stash of cash tucked away in my phone case just in case of digital payment failures.

vocab.meaning: bộ đồ dùng chăm sóc diện mạo cá nhân
vocab.example: A basic grooming kit consisting of a comb and some cologne helps me stay presentable throughout the day.

vocab.meaning: mang theo bên mình (thường là vật hơi nặng hoặc cồng kềnh)
vocab.example: I find it quite bothersome to tote around a heavy laptop, so I usually just carry a portable tablet.

vocab.meaning: mang đồ nhẹ nhàng, tối giản
vocab.example: Whether I'm going to work or a cafe, I prefer to travel light to remain agile and comfortable.

vocab.meaning: những vật dụng mang theo hàng ngày (thuật ngữ EDC)
vocab.example: My everyday carry is quite consistent, usually revolving around my keys, wallet, and a reusable water bottle.

vocab.meaning: đồ dùng vệ sinh cá nhân
vocab.example: Ever since the pandemic, sanitary supplies like wet wipes and alcohol spray have been permanent fixtures in my bag.

vocab.meaning: giữ trong người (túi quần, túi áo hoặc mang sát bên mình)
vocab.example: Valuable items like my passport are always kept on my person rather than in a checked bag.
I try to filter out redundant items from my backpack to avoid unnecessary strain on my shoulders.
